name: Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Green beans, fresh, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken, water, celery leaves, and small onion in a large saucepan. Reserve the celery stalks.
2. Cover the saucepan and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 1/2 hours until the chicken is tender. Remove the chicken and strain the broth into a bowl. Chill until the fat sets on top. Remove the fat.
3. Remove the skin and bones from the chicken and discard them. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
4. Return the broth to the saucepan. Chop the reserved celery stalks and add them along with the chopped onion, carrot, parsley, barley, lemon juice, and seasonings. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Add the green beans and chicken back into the soup and continue cooking for an additional 15 minutes or until the beans are tender. Serve each serving as 1 1/2 cups.
